summary: Documented 3 new CLI features (schema list/template, validation hints, envelope auto-injection) in CLAUDE.md and CHANGELOG.md. CLAUDE.md updated with new CLI commands in key commands list plus two new guidance paragraphs for schema templates and validation error hints. CHANGELOG.md updated with Unreleased section covering all Added and Changed items. No Korean mirror updates needed — CLAUDE.md and CHANGELOG.md do not have Korean mirrors.
concerns: Help skill (plugin/skills/help/SKILL.md) does not document CLI commands directly — it documents skills. The new schema commands are CLI-level, not skill-level, so no help skill update is needed. However, if a future CLI reference document is created, these commands should be included there.
